target.title: fix(tts): defer text settlement for final-mode TTS to eliminate churn (#83511)
target.body:
## Summary

When `messages.tts.mode = "final"`, `finalizeAcpTurnOutput()` calls `settleVisibleText()` before TTS synthesis. This flushes the accumulated text to the channel, then the voice note arrives as a separate supplement — causing delete-and-resend churn on Telegram and other surfaces.

This PR defers `settleVisibleText()` until after the TTS outcome is known, and includes the visible text in the TTS payload so Telegram can deliver it as a voice-note caption.

## Root cause

```
Current main flow:
  1. settleVisibleText()     → text message sent to Telegram
  2. maybeApplyTtsToPayload  → voice note synthesized
  3. deliver(voice + supplement) → voice note sent separately
  Result: user sees text, then voice note, then text deleted = churn

Fixed flow:
  1. Skip settleVisibleText()
  2. maybeApplyTtsToPayload  → voice note synthesized
  3. deliver(voice + text as caption) → one combined message
  4. (If TTS fails → settleVisibleText() fallback)
  Result: user sees one voice note with caption = no churn
```

## Changes

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `dispatch-acp.ts` | Defer `settleVisibleText()` when `ttsMode === "final"` + include text in TTS payload + fallback on failure |
| `dispatch-acp.test.ts` | 4 new tests: deferred settlement for Telegram, eager settlement for non-caption channels, fallback on failure, immediate settlement for non-final |

## Tests

```
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts
 ✓ auto-reply (54 tests) 30ms
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  54 passed (54)
```

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed**: Three issues fixed: (1) live ACP block text was delivered via sendBlockReply before the captioned final voice note in Telegram final-mode TTS, causing text-before-voice churn; (2) caption eligibility was hardcoded as `params.ttsChannel === "telegram"` in core dispatch code instead of using the existing channel capability seam; (3) accumulated text was silently lost when an ACP turn aborted before finalizeAcpTurnOutput() ran with block delivery suppressed.

- **Real environment tested**: Docker container (`node:24`, linux arm64, Node.js v24.16.0), source at commit `6b35c715`, with `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` inside the container.

- **Failing proof before fix**: Two separate regressions verified:
  1. Reverted source files to pre-capability-seam commit (`5aef407c`). The test `does not stream live ACP block text before captioned Telegram final TTS` fails: `sendBlockReply` was called 1 time. Tests: 1 failed | 56 passed (57).
  2. Reverted source to pre-abort-fix (`5f64e410`). The test `delivers suppressed Telegram live ACP block text when the turn aborts before final TTS` fails. Tests: 1 failed | 57 passed (58).

- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:

  ```bash
  docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)":/src:ro -e CI=true -w /build node:24 bash -c \'
  cp -a /src/. /build/ && rm -rf node_modules
  corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@latest --activate
  pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
  node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts
  node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/channels/plugins/tts-capabilities.test.ts
  node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/shared.test.ts
  \'
  ```

- **Evidence after fix**:

  ```
  ✓ auto-reply src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-acp.test.ts (58 tests) 91ms
  Test Files  1 passed (1)
  Tests  58 passed (58)

  ✓ channels src/channels/plugins/tts-capabilities.test.ts (1 test) 98ms
  Test Files  1 passed (1)
  Tests  1 passed (1)

  ✓ extension-telegram extensions/telegram/src/shared.test.ts (11 tests) 63ms
  Test Files  1 passed (1)
  Tests  11 passed (11)
  ```

- **Observed result after fix**: All 58 dispatch-acp tests pass including regression tests for: (a) live block suppression in Telegram captioned final TTS path, (b) abort-safe text fallback when the turn aborts before finalization, (c) deferred settlement timing. The fix uses a channel capability seam (`resolveChannelTtsVoiceDelivery(channel)?.captionedFinalText`), suppresses live block delivery via the ACP projector, and flushes deferred text on abort/error paths via `deliverSuppressedCaptionedTextFallback()`. The capability contract is documented with JSDoc in `types.core.ts`.

- **What was not tested**: Live Telegram TTS session (requires TTS provider credentials and a live Telegram bot conversation). The settlement deferral logic, live block suppression, abort fallback, capability seam, and all failure paths are validated by 58 unit tests in a Docker container.

Closes #83511
target.author: jerry-xin
